notes: Swedish ARMOX 600T armor steel by SSAB. 600 HBW hardness. Per ARL ADA493654: 15-25% higher V50 than MIL-DTL-46100 HHA → ~1.35 RHAe. Used in combat vehicles requiring elevated protection levels. ARMOX 600S is 570-640 HBW (UHH grade).

source.methodology: RHAe from ARL report ADA493654: ARMOX 600T V50 15-25% above MIL-DTL-46100 HHA (RHAe~1.25) → RHAe~1.35. Hardness per SSAB specification (600 HBW).
